records.text:
Instruction: show the last five commits
JSON: {"mode":"shell","command":"git log --oneline -5"}

Instruction: show git status
JSON: {"mode":"shell","command":"git status"}

records.instruction: move to project folder and go into all subfolders and create a subfolder archive
records.text:
Instruction: move to project folder and go into all subfolders and create a subfolder archive
JSON: {"mode":"shell","command":"find \"project\" -type d -exec mkdir -p \"{}/archive\" \\;"}

records.instruction: copy Dockerfile into every subfolder in projects
records.text:
Instruction: copy Dockerfile into every subfolder in projects
JSON: {"mode":"shell","command":"find \"projects\" -type d -exec cp \"Dockerfile\" \"{}/Dockerfile\" \\;"}

Instruction: create the nested directory workspace/docs/drafts
JSON: {"mode":"shell","command":"mkdir -p \"workspace/docs/drafts\""}

records.instruction: move into the test directory and add a subdirectory called test5
records.text:
Instruction: move into the test directory and add a subdirectory called test5
JSON: {"mode":"plan","steps":[{"mode":"cd","path":"test"},{"mode":"shell","command":"mkdir -p \"test5\""}]}

records.instruction: go into the workspace directory and make a file called README.md
records.text:
Instruction: go into the workspace directory and make a file called README.md
JSON: {"mode":"plan","steps":[{"mode":"cd","path":"workspace"},{"mode":"shell","command":"touch \"README.md\""}]}

records.instruction: change directory to service-a and start worker.py
records.text:
Instruction: change directory to service-a and start worker.py
JSON: {"mode":"plan","steps":[{"mode":"cd","path":"service-a"},{"mode":"shell","command":"python3 worker.py"}]}

Instruction: execute bundle.js with node
JSON: {"mode":"run_file","command":"node bundle.js"}

Instruction: create config.json inside billing
JSON: {"mode":"write_file","path":"billing/config.json","content":""}

records.instruction: make an empty file called LICENSE
records.text:
Instruction: make an empty file called LICENSE
JSON: {"mode":"write_file","path":"LICENSE","content":""}

action.text: I can help with local shell and file actions but not live weather.

records.text:
Instruction: tell me the weather
JSON: {"mode":"answer","text":"I can help with local shell and file actions but not live weather."}
